nasb.text: And in that day living waters will flow out of Jerusalem, half of them toward the eastern sea and the other half toward the western sea; it will be in summer as well as in winter.

esv.text: On that day living waters shall flow out from Jerusalem, half of them to the eastern sea and half of them to the western sea.  It shall continue in summer as in winter.

cnv.text: 到那日，必有活水從耶路撒冷流出來；一半流往東海，另一半流往西海；冬天夏天都是這樣。

ccb.text: 到那天，必有活水从耶路撒冷涌出，一半流向死海，一半流向地中海，冬夏不变。
